---
title: "Carbonels, The By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “Under the Storm,” “The Cook and the Captive,” etc."
---

## Carbonels, The By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “Under the Storm,” “The Cook and the Captive,” etc.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** n.d. [September 1895]
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London: National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, Westminster, New York: Thomas Whittaker, 2 & 3 Bible House.

### Notes

This story, and its sequel <i>Founded on Paper</i> are set in rural Hampshire, starting in the early 1820s, at the time CMY’s parents settled in Otterbourne.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
